title: Voice note
intro: Dictate or type your day. We turn it into entries for you to confirm.
aiDisclosure: For analysis, the text is sent to our AI service, which does not keep it.
placeholder: e.g. 3 loose stools this morning, pain at 6, I had a raclette last night
demoBanner: Demo mode — AI proxy not configured

review.title: Interpreted entries
review.empty: No entry detected. Rephrase or enter manually.

saveError: Couldn't save — your data is kept as a draft, try again.

premium.title: Voice note — Premium
premium.body: Voice notes turn a dictated sentence into ready-to-confirm entries. It is part of Crohnicle Premium.

errors.network: No connection. Try again or enter manually.
errors.server: Interpretation unavailable right now. Try again.
errors.refused: Sentence could not be interpreted. Rephrase.
errors.empty: Dictate or type your day first.
